chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-4927 of 2024 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of Misc.No.21897/2024 2.For hearing of main case. 23.04.2025 Mr.Ahmed Masood Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Khalid Rajpar, Advocate for Respondent. Mr.Shiraz Ahmed, Director, Post Clearance Audit, Customs South and Mr.Waseem Feroze, Deputy Collector, Post Clearance Audit, are present. Mr.Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General. Pursuant to Court notice Mr.Shiraz Ahmed, Director, Post Clearance Audit, Customs South is present. He states that audit in terms of Section 26-A and B of Customs Act has already been concluded and all information / documentation required has already been provided / received from the petitioner. In pursuance hereof, learned counsel for the respondent states that post audit all actions shall be taken in accordance with law after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. In view hereof, learned counsel for the petitioner states that the petition appears to have served its purpose, hence, it may be disposed of in above terms. Order accordingly. The presence and assistance of learned officers is appreciated. Judge Judge nasir
